title: Commodities under pressure amid China's weakening economic backdrop
section_path: Commodities under pressure amid China's weakening economic backdrop
section_path_text: Commodities under pressure amid China's weakening economic backdrop
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
The grim economic outlook in China continued to weigh on sentiment in commodity markets. Base metals led the complex lower, while gains in oil were offset by falls in coal in the energy sector. Image reference: 1653515253536.png | assets/2022-05-26_commodities-under-pressure-amid-chinas-weakening-economic-backdrop_img_1653515253536_f90cb825d5cd.png
Base metals fell across the board amid signals of weak economic growth in China.
